confirmed.title: core.md documents indexQuery(Builder): Builder but the method takes no parameter and returns mixed
confirmed.evidence: core.md line 21: `| \`indexQuery(Builder)\` | \`Builder\` | Hook to scope the listing |` — claims indexQuery accepts a Builder argument and returns Builder. Source packages/core/src/Resources/Resource.php line 167 declares `public function indexQuery(): mixed` with NO parameter, returning null by default (the controller falls back to `getModel()::query()`). Overrides build their own query inside; there is no injected $query Builder param and the return type is mixed, not Builder.
confirmed.fix: Change the doc row to reflect the real signature: `indexQuery(): mixed` — no parameter; return a query Builder (or null to fall back to the model's default query). e.g. `| \`indexQuery(): mixed\` | `?Builder` | Return a scoped query Builder, or null to fall back to `getModel()::query()` |.

verdict.reason:
CONFIRMED and NEW (not a duplicate). Verified both sides on disk. Doc apps/docs/reference/php/core.md:21 documents the row `| indexQuery(Builder) | Builder | Hook to scope the listing |`, claiming the method accepts a Builder argument and returns Builder. Source packages/core/src/Resources/Resource.php:167 declares `public function indexQuery(): mixed` — NO parameter, returning null by default (docblock at 160-166 confirms: "Returning null lets the controller fall back to static::getModel()::query()"). It is invoked with zero args (InertiaDataBuilder). So the doc signature is objectively wrong on both the parameter and the return type.

Not a swept duplicate: the docs-fixed-ledger.json has exactly one indexQuery entry (line 526/527) and it targets apps/docs/guide/resources.md line 106 (round 5) — a DIFFERENT file. Round 5's detection detail mentioned reference/php/core.md:21 as also needing the fix, but only the guide file was recorded in the ledger and fixed; core.md:21 on disk STILL reads `indexQuery(Builder) | Builder` (unfixed). The three ledger entries for reference/php/core.md cover lines 27 (lifecycle hooks), 20 (phantom actions()), and 52 (ResourceRegistry::discover param order) — none touch line 21 / indexQuery. The "SWEPT: reference/php/*.md setter/method signatures" family enumerates specific unrelated members and does not include indexQuery.

Proposed fix is sound: change the row to `| indexQuery(): mixed | ?Builder | Return a scoped query Builder, or null to fall back to getModel()::query() |`.
